code:
import io
import string
import list

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      match string.parse_int(s)
      when Some(n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(t_line)
    match string.parse_int(string.trim(t_line))
    when Some(target)
      match list.index_of(nums, target)
      when Some(idx)
        print("index=#{idx}")
      when None
        print("not_found")
      end
    when None
      print("not_found")
    end
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
when None
  print("not_found")
end
